title: 3D Rocket Jumper From TF2
description: The Rocket Jumper from TF2 but as a 3D model replacing Wind Charges! Also includes the Market Gardener from TF2 replacing the Mace (It's a 3D Shovel, It's badass trust me)
body:
this is my first time posting on modrinth so it might be SLIGHTLY messy
but this is basically a pack that replaces the Mace with the Market Gardener Shovel from TF2
and the wind charges with a ROCKET JUMPER! all 3d btw
made for 1.21 and above (obviously)
